title: HED schema library for SCORE annotations example
description: This BIDS dataset demonstrates the application of the Hierarchical Event Descriptor (HED) schema library for Standardized Computer-based Organized Reporting of EEG (SCORE) to annotate intracranial EEG recordings. The dataset contains iEEG data from a single subject acquired during clinical photic stimulation at Mayo Clinic Rochester, with machine-readable event annotations validated against both BIDS and HED standards. This example illustrates best practices for FAIR data annotation in neuroimaging research using structured, hierarchical event descriptors.
methods_description: Intracranial EEG data were collected from one subject during clinical photic stimulation at Mayo Clinic Rochester, MN. Events are annotated using HED-SCORE schema library tags recorded in _events.tsv files with corresponding definitions in _events.json sidecars.
